updates.tweet_text:
We finally got a little vol overnight. All week the  #ES_F range was 7574 (which paid us 5x) to 7620. Overnight, it finally lost. Per newsletter, traps of 7527 were buyable & we just got it

Plan: 7558, 7565, 7575 next (bulls must recover). 7527 (watch traps)=support. Sell below https://t.co/kmOQvxMS4a
updates.notes: All prices cited (7527, 7558, 7563/7565≈7563, 7574/7575≈7574.5, 7620) are already in the morning plan; tweet is a reaffirmation/recap, not new levels.

updates.tweet_text: @DavidBohn11 I don't do that unless I'm in a trade. I have stops set on my existing trades but I don't really care what price does in the middle of the night If I'm not actively trading. I only look to take 5 or so points out a day and I can usually find that during my usual trading hours
updates.notes: Reply tweet explaining trading habits/schedule. No prices mentioned, no actionable levels of any kind.

updates.tweet_text: @PotsieWeber1949 @DavidBohn11 Its mostly the same every trade, I cut it in half though when volatility is extremely elevated  but we haven't had conditions to warrant that since March
updates.notes: Reply about position sizing/volatility management. No prices mentioned, no actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text:
Last evening we finally broke down the multi-day range which was 7574 to 7620. First stop down was 7527 per yesterday's 4pm newsletter. We held it exact all night, then trapped below at 7:40AM to trigger long.

No change from 8am post. 7558, 7565, 7575 next. Bulls must recover 75 https://t.co/Fp8HJOeBHt
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7527, 7558, 7565/7574, 7575/7574.5, 7576) are in the morning plan or are hindsight/reaffirmation references. No new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text:
Good follow through and there's 7558 1st target hit in #ES_F. The setup was the Failed Breakdown of 7527 which was a massive support shelf. We got it at 7:40Am. Targets today were 7558 (hit), 7565, 7575 (must must recover to bottom it out).

7527=support still, sell below https://t.co/JyyUJroV76
updates.notes: All prices (7558, 7527, 7565, 7575) are morning-plan levels; tweet is reaffirmation + trade observation, no new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @experimntal I may be interested in other entries on the way down but just none actually triggered! we never got the 65 failed breakdown last evening for example.
updates.notes: Conversational reply referencing a prior setup that never triggered ('65 failed breakdown'). No new actionable level named; '65' is a casual shorthand reference, not a new level introduction.

updates.tweet_text:
Most the good action done for now in #ES_F. 7575 to 7620 was the multi-day range. It broke down this morning. 7527 then became supports, and traps of that shelf trigger long. We triggered at 740AM. 

Todays targets were 7558 (hit), 7565 (hit), 7575. Recovery bottoms us to 7587+ https://t.co/GobdkVF7BO
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7575, 7620, 7527, 7558, 7565, 7587) are morning-plan levels or observations of hits/price action; no new actionable levels named.

updates.tweet_text: @lukeylukerton Accumulation was done at 27 overnight and with the failed breakdown. Can very clearly see massive institutional buying there (and its why it was a long trigger)
updates.notes: Conversational reply explaining why 7527 was a long trigger — observation/hindsight of existing morning-plan level, no new actionable level named.

updates.tweet_text:
Today was a simple day & good illustration of how my edge works. 1) Price goes "elevator down" 2) The Failed Breakdown zone is planned - 7527 in this case. It sweeps, bears trapped, we long. 3) Targets given: 7558, 7565, 7575, 7587. All hit in #ES_F.

Work done. 7604, 7620 next https://t.co/wTcapd7gGP
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7527, 7558, 7565, 7575, 7587, 7604, 7620) are morning-plan levels or reaffirmations; tweet is hindsight recap with no new actionable levels.

updates.tweet_text: @fin202twit Stops always go below the lowest low. So in this case a few points under 7525
updates.notes: Trade management reply — specifying stop placement below 7525. No new actionable level named; 7527 is already in morning plan.

updates.tweet_text:
Long still paying & work is done until the next "elevator down" sell to trap bears again. 7527 was support given and #ES_F formed a shelf there. Flush and recovery was long trigger. Triggered 7:40AM. Targets were 7558, 7565, 7575, 7587 (all hit).

7604, 7620 next, then breakout https://t.co/uRr6L4PWSX
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7527, 7558, 7565, 7575, 7587, 7604, 7620) are morning-plan levels or hindsight trade recaps — no new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: @Shepdog69138782 Market will continue going up for several years as I've said repetitively since May last year, but dips will vary in size. They wont always be a 1 day dip. We will have several larger/longer corrections to trap bears more extensively
updates.notes: Pure directional commentary on multi-year market outlook. No specific price levels named or actionable entries/targets/supports/resistances mentioned.

updates.tweet_text: @Super_Straigh_T Always do in an uptrend! Just a matter of how long it takes. Its been quicker than usual lately though

updates.tweet_text:
There's 7604 tagged. Another massive bear trap in #ES_F. The squeeze trigger was same as always: A Failed Breakdown. Failed Breakdown of 7527 was the long trigger, we got it at 7:40AM. Targets given 8am were 7588, 7565, 7575, 7587, 7604.

7620 next, then multi-day trend starts https://t.co/K1NlzVmdkO
updates.notes: All prices mentioned (7527, 7588, 7565, 7575, 7587, 7604, 7620) are morning-plan levels or hindsight references to targets already given; no new actionable levels introduced.

updates.tweet_text: Closing update #ES_F: Another big bear trap day as we swept the shelf at 7527, recovered, then rallied. Now just ride runner for 7620, 7630, then 7652+. 7587 is nearest support now. Newsletter out soon with next entries
updates.notes: 7652 named as a new upside target ('7652+') not in morning plan; 7620/7630/7587 are morning-plan levels (reaffirmations).

updates.tweet_text: @AnthonyPetril15 Stops on runners go below the prior days low OR beneath a major and clear higher low. Put it under by a few points
updates.notes: Trade management advice about stop placement rules; no specific actionable price level named.

updates.tweet_text: @Shepdog69138782 Eventually, but we are still fairly early in this bull market technically speaking. Topping process itself takes about a year and maybe a couple years before that even starts

updates.tweet_text: @NYJets2017 @Shepdog69138782 Markets generally don't care about economics unless there is a major recession/financial crisis, only care about flows, liquidity, and the fact institutions cannot underperform. It all appears on the chart.
